title: Peterson Lab Raw Metagenome Reads Metadata Schema
description: Schema for the initial metadata file of raw metagenome sequencing data within the Peterson Lab Bioinformatics Scaffold.

productType.description: A descriptive string identifying the type of data product this metadata file describes.
productType.const: Peterson Lab Bioinformatics Scaffold - Raw Metagenome Reads Metadata

schemaVersion.description: The version of this JSON schema.

dataSteward.description: The name of the individual responsible for the accuracy and maintenance of this metadata record.

metagenomeID.description: The Peterson Lab's unique internal identifier for the metagenome sample. Follows the format: MG_<subsiteID>_<YYYYMMDD>_<depth>_<unique_4_digit_number>.

dateRecordCreated.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this specific JSON metadata record was initially generated.

provenanceNotes.description: A brief, high-level note documenting the creation context of this metadata record.

rawSequencingFiles.description: Detailed information for each individual raw sequencing file associated with the metagenome sample.

fileName.description: The exact name of the raw sequencing file (as stored on the server).

originalName.description: The original filename of the sequencing file as provided by the sequencing facility or external source.

checksum.description: The MD5 checksum of the file.

fileSizeBytes.description: The size of the raw sequencing file in bytes.

numberOfReads.description: The total number of sequencing reads contained within the file.

readPair.description: For paired-end sequencing, indicates if the file contains Read 1 (1) or Read 2 (2).

storageInformation.description: Details about where the raw sequencing data is publicly or internally stored.

accessionType.description: The type of accession or storage service (e.g., NCBI, ENA, Local NAS).

accessionID.description: The specific identifier associated with the accessionType (e.g., SRR ID, BioSample ID).

url.description: A direct URL link to the accession or storage location.

nucleicAcidSequencingInformation.description: Comprehensive details about the nucleic acid sequencing experiment.

sequencingID.description: An identifier for the specific sequencing run or project, as provided by the sequencing facility.

dateOfSubmission.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the sample was submitted for sequencing.

sequencingPrepNotes.description: Any notes regarding the preparation of the sample for sequencing submission.

sequencingInformation.description: Detailed parameters of the sequencing run itself.

sequencingLocation.description: The name of the facility or lab where sequencing took place.

libraryPrepKit.description: The name and version of the library preparation kit used.

sequencingType.description: The broad category of sequencing (e.g., Shotgun Metagenomics).

sequencingInstrument.description: The specific instrument model used for sequencing.

sequencingChemistry.description: The version or type of sequencing chemistry used.

sequencingLengthRequest.description: The requested sequencing type and read length (e.g., '150 bp paired-end').

sequencingReadsRequest.description: The requested number of raw sequencing reads (e.g., 20000000 for 20M reads).

insertSizeRequest.description: The requested or target insert size for the library preparation, in base pairs.

sequencingNotes.description: Any additional free-text notes related to the sequencing process.

nucleicAcidExtractionInformation.description: Details about the process of extracting nucleic acids from the raw sample.

extractionID.description: An internal identifier for the specific extraction batch or process.

extractionType.description: The type of nucleic acid extracted (e.g., DNA, RNA).

extractionDate.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the nucleic acid extraction was performed.

extractionMethod.description: A high-level description of the extraction method used.

extractionSOP.description: The title and version of the Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) document used for the extraction.

internalSpike.description: Details about any internal spike-in controls used during extraction.

type.description: The type of internal spike, e.g., 'none', 'PhiX', 'internal_standard_name'.

qualityMetrics.description: An array containing key quality control metrics for the extracted nucleic acid.

dnaConcentrationMethod.description: The method used to measure DNA concentration (e.g., Qubit, NanoDrop).

dnaConcentrationUnit.description: The unit of DNA concentration (e.g., µg/ml, ng/µl).

environmentalSamplingMetadata.description: Comprehensive information about the environmental context and collection of the sample.

ecosystemID.description: A unique identifier for the broader ecosystem type or project.

ecosystemName.description: A descriptive name for the broader ecosystem.

siteID.description: A unique identifier for the specific sampling site within the ecosystem.

siteName.description: A descriptive name for the specific sampling site.

subsiteID.description: A unique identifier for a more granular location within the site.

subsiteName.description: A descriptive name for the more granular subsite.

subsiteLatitude.description: The latitude of the sampling subsite in decimal degrees (WGS84 assumed).

subsiteLongitude.description: The longitude of the sampling subsite in decimal degrees (WGS84 assumed).

depthDefinition.description: The unit and context of the depth (e.g., 'm', 'cm_from_surface', 'mbsf').

date.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the sample was collected.

time.description: The time (HH:MM or HH:MM:SS) when the sample was collected, typically in 24-hour format.

collectionMethod.description: The method or equipment used to collect the sample.

containerID.description: An internal identifier for the container the raw sample was stored in upon collection.

preservationMethod.description: The method used to preserve the sample immediately after collection.

collectionNotes.description: Any additional free-text notes related to the sample collection event.

containerNotes.description: Any additional free-text notes related to the sample container or its contents immediately after collection.

quantityOfSample.description: The approximate quantity of the raw sample collected. Can be a number or 'NA' if not applicable.

quantityUnit.description: The unit of measurement for the quantityOfSample (e.g., 'ml', 'grams').
